flow-definition.description: Download MacOS artifacts for macos_aarch64 from Artifactory location, do some verification and, if succesful, publish to GitHub<!-- Managed by Jenkins Job Builder -->

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: SAPMACHINE_VERSION
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: The SapMachine Release Tag to upload MacOS artifacts for. Should start with "sapmachine-". E.g. "sapmachine-17.0.6".

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: PUBLISH_CASKS
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: When set to true, update homebrew casks.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: DOWNLOAD_URL_PREFIX
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: This string will be suffixed with e.g. "/sapmachine-jdk_darwinaarch64/11.0.18/sapmachine-jdk_darwinaarch64-11.0.18.dmg" to compute the download location of the standard artifacts.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: DOWNLOAD_SYMBOLS_URL_PREFIX
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: This string will be suffixed with e.g. "/sapmachine-symbols_darwinaarch64/17.0.6/sapmachine-symbols_darwinaarch64-17.0.6.tar.gz" to compute the download location of the symbol files.
